question_text: What is your favorite aspect of your favorite holiday?
Which of these holidays do you celebrate?
On a scale of 1 to 5, how important are holidays to you?
Do you have any unique traditions or rituals associated with your favorite holiday?
How do you typically celebrate your favorite holiday?
If you could create a new holiday, what would it be and why?
Do you prefer holidays that are more religious or secular in nature?
How much do you typically spend on gifts and celebrations for your favorite holiday?
What is your earliest or fondest memory of celebrating holidays?
